versions.installHtml: # k0rdent includes the template for Azure Kubernetes Service out of the box
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get clustertemplate -n kcm-system
# NAME                            VALID
# azure-aks-0-2-0                 true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: ClusterDeployment
metadata:
  name: my-azure-aks-clusterdeployment1
  namespace: kcm-system
  labels:
    type: azure
    group: demo
spec:
  template: azure-aks-0-2-0  # name of the clustertemplate
  credential: azure-credential-aks
  config:
    location: "westus"
    machinePools:
      system:
        count: 1
        vmSize: Standard_A4_v2
      user:
        count: 1
        vmSize: Standard_A4_v2
